name: @clearline/data-access-reconciliation
description: Reconciliation data-access layer for clearline-web: React Query hooks over the independently-fetched /api/reconciliation/* panels (summary, exceptions queue, matched, balance-integrity) plus the queue mutations (confirm/reject a suggestion, dismiss, split, re-run) behind US-CW-016. Surfaces the 403 role check and the 422 split-mismatch as typed errors. No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-010 (US-CW-016 Bank Feed Reconciliation).
